examples.grammarPoint: Noun を めぐる Noun
examples.sentence: この事件をめぐる議論が続いています。
examples.translation: The debate concerning this incident continues.
examples.translationEn: The debate concerning this incident continues.
examples.romaji: Kono jiken o meguru giron ga tsudzuite imasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun を めぐる Noun
examples.sentence: 環境問題をめぐる国際会議が開かれます。
examples.translation: An international conference regarding environmental issues will be held.
examples.translationEn: An international conference regarding environmental issues will be held.
examples.romaji: Kankyō mondai o meguru kokusai kaigi ga hirakaremasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun を めぐる Noun
examples.sentence: 彼の突然の辞任をめぐるうわさが広がっている。
examples.translation: Rumors are spreading concerning his sudden resignation.
examples.translationEn: Rumors are spreading concerning his sudden resignation.
examples.romaji: Kare no totsuzen no jinin o meguru uwasa ga hirogatte iru.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun を めぐる Noun
examples.sentence: 映画祭をめぐる活動が多くなっています。
examples.translation: There are increasing activities surrounding the film festival.
examples.translationEn: There are increasing activities surrounding the film festival.
examples.romaji: Eigashai o meguru katsudō ga ōku natte imasu.

examples.sentence: この映画は実話をもとに作られました。
examples.translation: This movie was made based on a true story.
examples.translationEn: This movie was made based on a true story.
examples.romaji: Kono eiga wa jitsuwa o moto ni tsukuraremashita.

examples.sentence: 彼の経験をもとにアドバイスが必要だ。
examples.translation: Advice is needed based on his experience.
examples.translationEn: Advice is needed based on his experience.
examples.romaji: Kare no keiken o moto ni adobaisu ga hitsuyō da.

examples.sentence: データをもとに分析を行いました。
examples.translation: I performed an analysis based on the data.
examples.translationEn: I performed an analysis based on the data.
examples.romaji: Dēta o moto ni bunseki o okonaimashita.

examples.sentence: 世界中の美術館をもとにコレクションを作りました。
examples.translation: I created a collection based on art galleries all over the world.
examples.translationEn: I created a collection based on art galleries all over the world.
examples.romaji: Sekaijū no bijutsukan o moto ni korekushon o tsukurimashita.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun を もとにして
examples.sentence: 彼の意見をもとにして、計画を変更しました。
examples.translation: Based on his opinion, we changed the plan.
examples.translationEn: Based on his opinion, we changed the plan.
examples.romaji: Kare no iken o moto ni shite, keikaku o henkō shimashita.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun を もとにして
examples.sentence: この小説は実話をもとにして書かれています。
examples.translation: This novel is written based on a true story.
examples.translationEn: This novel is written based on a true story.
examples.romaji: Kono shōsetsu wa jitsuwa o moto ni shite kakarete imasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun を もとにして
examples.sentence: 資料をもとにして、レポートを作成しました。
examples.translation: I created the report based on the materials.
examples.translationEn: I created the report based on the materials.
examples.romaji: Shiryō o moto ni shite, repōto o sakusei shimashita.

examples.grammarPoint: Noun を もとにして
examples.sentence: 過去の成功例をもとにして、新しいプロジェクトを進める予定です。
examples.translation: We plan to proceed with the new project based on past successful examples.
examples.translationEn: We plan to proceed with the new project based on past successful examples.
examples.romaji: Kako no seikōrei o moto ni shite, atarashii purojekuto o susumeru yotei desu.

examples.sentence: 彼女は泣くことなく帰ってしまいました。
examples.translation: She went home without crying.
examples.translationEn: She went home without crying.
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa naku koto naku kaette shimaimashita.

examples.sentence: 彼は注意することなく突然出かけた。
examples.translation: He suddenly left without giving any warning.
examples.translationEn: He suddenly left without giving any warning.
examples.romaji: Kare wa chūi suru koto naku totsuzen dekaketa.

examples.sentence: 山田さんは誰にも話すことなく会社を辞めました。
examples.translation: Mr. Yamada quit the company without talking to anyone.
examples.translationEn: Mr. Yamada quit the company without talking to anyone.
examples.romaji: Yamada-san wa dare ni mo hanasu koto naku kaisha o yamemashita.

examples.sentence: ２０年間、病気になることなく働いています。
examples.translation: I have been working for 20 years without getting sick.
examples.translationEn: I have been working for 20 years without getting sick.
examples.romaji: Nijūnenkan, byōki ni naru koto naku hataraite imasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないことには Verb ない
examples.sentence: 薬を飲まないことには、病気が治らない。
examples.translation: Unless you take the medicine, the illness won't get better.
examples.translationEn: Unless you take the medicine, the illness won't get better.
examples.romaji: Kusuri o nomanai koto ni wa, byōki ga naoranai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないことには Verb ない
examples.sentence: この問題によく考えないことには、解決できない。
examples.translation: Unless you think carefully about this problem, you can't solve it.
examples.translationEn: Unless you think carefully about this problem, you can't solve it.
examples.romaji: Kono mondai ni yoku kangaenai koto ni wa, kaiketsu dekinai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないことには Verb ない
examples.sentence: 練習をしないことには、スキルが上達しない。
examples.translation: Unless you practice, your skills won't improve.
examples.translationEn: Unless you practice, your skills won't improve.
examples.romaji: Renshū o shinai koto ni wa, sukiru ga jōtatsu shinai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないことには Verb ない
examples.sentence: 手続きをしないことには、新しいパスポートがもらえない。
examples.translation: Unless you go through the procedures, you can't get a new passport.
examples.translationEn: Unless you go through the procedures, you can't get a new passport.
examples.romaji: Tetsuzuki o shinai koto ni wa, atarashii pasupōto ga moraenai.

examples.sentence: 長い時間待ったあげく、電車が来なかった。
examples.translation: After waiting a long time, in the end, the train didn't come.
examples.translationEn: After waiting a long time, in the end, the train didn't come.
examples.romaji: Nagai jikan matta ageku, densha ga konakatta.

examples.sentence: いろいろな方法を試したあげく、成功した。
examples.translation: After trying various methods, I finally succeeded.
examples.translationEn: After trying various methods, I finally succeeded.
examples.romaji: Iroiro na hōhō o tameshita ageku, seikō shita.

examples.sentence: 彼は失敗のあげく、会社を辞める決心をした。
examples.translation: In the end, after his failures, he decided to quit the company.
examples.translationEn: In the end, after his failures, he decided to quit the company.
examples.romaji: Kare wa shippai no ageku, kaisha o yameru kesshin o shita.

examples.sentence: 彼女は長い間悩んだあげく、その仕事を断った。
examples.translation: After worrying for a long time, she finally turned down the job.
examples.translationEn: After worrying for a long time, she finally turned down the job.
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa nagai aida nayanda ageku, sono shigoto o kotowatta.

examples.sentence: 昨日は疲れすぎたあまり、朝まで眠り続けました。
examples.translation: Yesterday, I was so tired that I slept until morning.
examples.translationEn: Yesterday, I was so tired that I slept until morning.
examples.romaji: Kinō wa tsukare-sugita amari, asa made nemuri tsuzukemashita.

examples.sentence: 彼女はうれしいあまり、泣き出してしまった。
examples.translation: She was so happy that she ended up crying.
examples.translationEn: She was so happy that she ended up crying.
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa ureshii amari, nakidashite shimatta.

examples.sentence: 彼は安全を確認するあまり、何回もドアをチェックしている。
examples.translation: He is so concerned about safety that he checks the door many times.
examples.translationEn: He is so concerned about safety that he checks the door many times.
examples.romaji: Kare wa anzen o kakunin suru amari, nankai mo doa o chekku shite iru.

examples.sentence: 寒さのあまり、彼は震えが止まらなかった。
examples.translation: It was so cold that he couldn't stop shivering.
examples.translationEn: It was so cold that he couldn't stop shivering.
examples.romaji: Samusa no amari, kare wa furue ga tomaranakatta.

examples.sentence: 元気なうちに、旅行を楽しんでください。
examples.translation: Enjoy traveling while you are healthy.
examples.translationEn: Enjoy traveling while you are healthy.
examples.romaji: Genki na uchi ni, ryokō o tanoshinde kudasai.

examples.sentence: 若いうちに、いろいろなことを学ぶべきだ。
examples.translation: One should learn various things while they are young.
examples.translationEn: One should learn various things while they are young.
examples.romaji: Wakai uchi ni, iroiro na koto o manabu beki da.

examples.sentence: 子供が寝ているうちに、夕食の準備をしましょう。
examples.translation: Let's prepare dinner while the kids are sleeping.
examples.translationEn: Let's prepare dinner while the kids are sleeping.
examples.romaji: Kodomo ga nete iru uchi ni, yūshoku no junbi o shimashō.

examples.sentence: 雨が降らないうちに、家に帰りましょう。
examples.translation: Let's go home before it starts raining.
examples.translationEn: Let's go home before it starts raining.
examples.romaji: Ame ga furanai uchi ni, ie ni kaerimashō.
